# quismon_notification_channel (Data Source)

Fetches a Quismon notification channel by name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Channel name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Channel ID.
- `type` (String) Channel type.
